data_quality_notes: Proxy used: Livestock production index (World Bank). Primary proxy (EDGAR ammonia emissions) was excluded as already used by OEB-H04. FAOSTAT also excluded (used by OEB-H08). Merged dataset: 3756 observations across 189 countries. Livestock-related indicators are available primarily for years with World Bank coverage.
summary: Testing whether Livestock production index correlates positively with OEB (ozone exposure in KBAs). Pearson r=0.060 (p=0.000), Spearman rho=0.070 (p=0.000). Partial r=0.020 (p=0.236) controlling for log(GPC). Best functional form: quadratic. Verdict: partially_confirmed.
